title: NYCEM — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Emergency Management (NYCEM) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the NYCEM Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/em, the Notify NYC alerting platform (rented Everbridge; CAP RSS feed at feeds.everbridge.net), and the Ready NY / CERT preparedness programs. Includes the NYC geography spine (BOROCODE, BBL/BIN, council/community districts) and the hurricane evacuation-zone key.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

BoroCode.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/BoroCode); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/BoroCode still resolve.

EvacuationZone.description: NYC hurricane evacuation zone ('Evac_Zone'), 1 (highest risk) through 6, ordering the coastal-storm evacuation.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Geometry.description: GeoJSON-style geometry carried by NYCEM's geospatial datasets ('the_geom') — points for centers, polygons for evacuation zones.

NotificationCategory.description: Notify NYC / CAP alert category ('category' in the CAP RSS feed).
